text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's the day of the Spring Fan Fest, an event
which promotes interaction between the students
and their fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I catch sight of Yaeno Muteki by the front gates,
handing out brochures.
choice_data_list: Hey. Are you helping with student council stuff?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Good afternoon, Trainer. No, it's nothing of the
sort.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I had free time, so I started standing here in the
hopes of interacting with my fans. I thought these
brochures might come in handy.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Omigosh, Yaeno Muteki?! Hello! I watch all your
races and concerts!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Thank you for your support.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I absolutely love how gallant you are, both on the
track and on stage! You're so awesome!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I see.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan A
text_block_list.text: Yeah, and uh...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Yes?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan A
text_block_list.text: Er... I-I'll be cheering for you!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I haven't been able to maintain one
conversation with a fan since I started standing
here.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Well, yer not exactly the most chummy of people,
are ya?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya gotta remember that we're used to dealin' with
fans, but they're not used to talkin' to us, so they
tend to lose their nerves. 'Specially in first
meetings.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Plus, that grim martial artist vibe ya give off's no
joke.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross and Inari One happen to overhear
our conversation and decide to chime in.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They're both thoughtful and considerate, so they
must have noticed Yaeno Muteki's struggles and
decided to offer some advice.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I see... I suppose it's true I haven't exactly
been doing my best to be "chummy"...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Still, it wouldn't really be like you to force
yourself to be all buddy-buddy either.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: For sure. Your brusque nature's what makes you, you. It's also probably what the fans wanna see.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Y'know what? Why don't we try makin' the
most of that hard-to-approach aura of yours?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: No time for questions! Just follow me!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Come one, come all! Try your hand at a
no-holds-barred game of President! We've even
got a prize for the winner!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Which one of ya brave souls're willin' to face
Yaeno Muteki, da undefeated Peerless Poker
Face herself?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan B
text_block_list.text:
A no-holds-barred competition against Yaeno
Muteki?! I must seize this opportunity!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Man, Yaeno Muteki's so awesome when she gets
fired up! If it's just a card game, then even I have
a shot at winning... All right, I'm in!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me. Would you care to join us for a round
of President?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan A
text_block_list.text:
What? Me?! W-wow, I can't believe I'm getting a
direct invitation from Yaeno Muteki... Yes,
please! I'd love to join!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Count me in too! There's nothin' like a good ol'
competition to get Edo blood pumpin'!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Righty-o, let da games begin!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Pass. Your turn.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan C
text_block_list.text:
She chose to pass?! But why? We're only halfway
through the game... Is she out of cards? Wait, could she
be hiding an ace up her sleeve?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Gah... I can't get a read on her! Her face is an
unflinching mask!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: How do ya like this?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan B
text_block_list.text: Hmph! If that's your play, then—

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Wh-what's this aura I feel? It's coming from
Yaeno Muteki!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Hehe... I see. This crushing pressure must
be a warning for me not to get too cocky... Very
well! I accept your challenge!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: It's my turn. Take this.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan B
text_block_list.text:
What?! That threatening aura was just a ploy to
make me fumble! Argh, how foolish I was!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Well, well, well. Could this be the end of the road
for the Peerless Poker Face?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: This's my chance!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan B
text_block_list.text: Curses... Pass!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Yaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: That was my last card.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Wha?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Dang... Looks like I played right into yer hands.
Guess I lost, fair 'n' square!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Victory has been decided! Yaeno wins!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Osu!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I-I can't believe it! I got to hear Yaeno Muteki's
"Osu!" in person! Awesome!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I've learned much of my own shortcomings
through this test of mettle against you, Yaeno
Muteki. Thank you for your guidance!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It wasn't my intention to lend you guidance, but
I'm glad you were able to gain something from
this.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan A
text_block_list.text: I had a blast playing with you! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The time I spent with you today was very
meaningful to me as well.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Having personally interacted with you all, I'm sure
your faces will come to mind whenever I run in a
race.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Having a concrete image to associate with my
fans gives me yet more strength to work hard.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
To all those who came to speak to me today, I
offer my utmost gratitude and humbly ask for
your continued support.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! You really are so sincere and polite! But
you don't have to ask me twice! Or even once! I'll
definitely keep cheering for you no matter what!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Seems we've come to the moment of truth.
Now, how to proceed...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What's going on?! Why's the air suddenly
feel so thick and heavy? Gah! What immense
pressure!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan B
text_block_list.text:
This aura must be coming from Yaeno Muteki and
Inari One!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan B
text_block_list.text: Ngh... What overwhelming force! I didn't think a no-holds-barred competition could go this far!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan A
text_block_list.text:
S-so this is the world of competition that Yaeno
Muteki contends in!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Bring it on!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan B
text_block_list.text: ...Pass.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Now's my chance!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: That was my last card!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Wha?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Dang it, my read on you was totally wrong... You
got me good!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Victory's decided! Yaeno wins!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Osu!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Oooooh!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki, you were incredible! To say I was
blown away by your spirit during the match would
be an understatement!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. However, I apologize I wasn't able to
speak in a more engaging manner.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan A
text_block_list.text:
That's okay! I was still able to read your emotions
through the energy you gave off during the game!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Same here... I feel like I know you better now that
I've played with you!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Why, what a thought! Though, I suppose that
makes sense, as I am my truest self during a
competition.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
What a joy it is to know you were able to see my
real self! I don't believe there is a greater delight
than this!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I shall not forget any one of you, nor the heated
battle we fought today.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I daresay your faces will come to mind whenever I
race from now on!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
From the bottom of my heart, I thank you all! And
I humbly ask for your continued support!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! I didn't know you could be so passionate!
What an unexpected surprise. The more I learn
about you, the bigger a fan I'm become!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Inari, Tamamo—thank you both. Because of you, I
was able to get to know my fans.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, don't mention it! Everybody's got stuff they
aren't good at, and it's just human nature to help
each other out!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
'Sides, everyone loved the event, so I'd say we're
even!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'm indebted to you both. If either of you
ever need help, please come to me.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Man, you're serious as ever! I like that about ya,
though!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Getting to interact with her fans seems to have
been a great source of encouragement for Yaeno
Muteki!
